race.comment: DOLCE D'AMOUR (3) is having her first try in Darwin but has been freshened since a win in Alice Springs. Has good early speed and is expected to take running down. MISS BOOM (6) is also in great form and a last start Alice Springs winner. Has a tricky draw to overcome but expected to go close again. NO I'M NOT (8) is better than recent form and has been kept fresh since last run here. Is a course and distance winner. Aided by the claim and will be winding up late. VILLA ROYALE (2) is better than last run and worth another try. STARLITE REBEL (5) is working up to a win. Expected to be in the finish again.
